description: Single authoritative source of truth for insert_me public product status. All public-facing docs and drift checks derive stable claims from this file.
maturity_label: alpha -- offline/evaluation use only; not production-hardened
not_yet_available: CWE-787 Out-of-bounds Write (PLANNED -- single remaining planned strategy; broader candidate families also deferred)
AST-based or compiler-backed patching/validation (future phases; current analysis is lexical/regex only)
Phase 7B real LLM adjudicator (LLMAdjudicator.adjudicate() raises NotImplementedError; heuristic is production default)
Parallel execution (generate-corpus and generate-portfolio execute cases sequentially; process-level parallelism deferred)
Portfolio reproducibility check script (check_portfolio_stability.py not yet built; single-target check_plan_stability.py exists)
Production codebase support (evaluation-only toy/lab targets only; not a goal for this phase)

stability_policy.phase: STABLE   -- required in README status table and all doc headers
stability_policy.admitted_strategy_count: STABLE   -- required in README status table
stability_policy.admitted_strategy_ids: STABLE   -- required to appear in README pipeline/strategy section
stability_policy.canonical_workflow_labels: STABLE   -- required in CLI help epilog and README workflow table
stability_policy.not_yet_available: STABLE   -- required in README; items must be removed when implemented
stability_policy.workload_classes_manifest: STABLE   -- required file; workload taxonomy + measured benchmarks
stability_policy.support_envelope_doc: STABLE   -- required file; target profiles + operating envelope
stability_policy.test_count: VOLATILE -- tracked in manifest only; must NOT be hard-coded in README or docs
stability_policy.corpus_seed_counts: SEMI-STABLE -- tracked in manifest only; not required in README status table

corpus_counts.note: Semi-stable. Track here, not in README.

test_counts.note: Volatile. Track here, not in README or ARCHITECTURE status blocks.
